scripts.stop: lsof -ti :8000 -ti :5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "$PWD/venv/bin/uvicorn main:app" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "mediabrief.*start.py" 2>/dev/null || true; ps -axo pid=,command= | awk '/[P]ython .*start.py/ {print $1}' | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; echo stopped
scripts.dev: pnpm stop; concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm serve:api" "pnpm dev:web"
scripts.build: cd frontend && pnpm install && pnpm build
